---
title: "clone"
excerpt: "Clone a sketch or solid."
layout: manual
---

Clone a sketch or solid.

This works essentially like a copy-paste operation.

```js
clone(geometry: Geometry) -> Geometry
```


### Arguments

| Name | Type | Description | Required |
|----------|------|-------------|----------|
| `geometry` | [`Geometry`](/docs/kcl/types/Geometry) | A geometry. | Yes |

### Returns

[`Geometry`](/docs/kcl/types/Geometry) - A geometry.


### Examples

```js
exampleSketch = startSketchOn("XY")
  |> startProfileAt([0, 0], %)
  |> line(end = [10, 0])
  |> line(end = [0, 10])
  |> line(end = [-10, 0])
  |> close()

clonedSketch = clone(exampleSketch)
```

![Rendered example of clone 0](data:image/png;base64,)

```js
exampleSketch = startSketchOn("XY")
  |> startProfileAt([0, 0], %)
  |> line(end = [10, 0])
  |> line(end = [0, 10])
  |> line(end = [-10, 0])
  |> close()

myPart = extrude(exampleSketch, length = 5)
clonedPart = clone(myPart)
```

![Rendered example of clone 1](data:image/png;base64,)
